Syntax Definition wcnvrefrel 38574
Description: Extend the definition of a wff to include the converse reflexive relation predicate. (Read: is a converse reflexive relation.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
cR
Assertion
Ref Expression
wcnvrefrel CnvRefRel
